summary: Food Commission System tested successfully. All 9 backend tests passed. Admin can GET/PUT food commissions, seller sees changes immediately, and commission calculation at delivery uses the correct rates from DB.
critical_code_review_comments: Commission flow is correctly implemented: Admin changes -> commission_rates collection (id='food') -> Seller API reads from same collection -> Delivery calculation uses same collection
CommissionsTab.js correctly displays food commissions section with edit functionality for admin
complete_delivery_and_pay_driver() correctly calculates platform_commission, commission_rate, and seller_earning

success_rate.frontend: Could not verify UI due to loading issues, but APIs work correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Food commission system tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/admin/food/commissions returns all store type commission rates. 2) PUT /api/admin/food/commissions updates rates in commission_rates collection (id='food'). 3) Seller API /api/food/my-store/commission reads from same collection, so changes reflect immediately. 4) complete_delivery_and_pay_driver() in food_orders.py uses get_food_commission_rates_from_db() to calculate correct commission at delivery time.

seller_commission_reflects_changes.verification: Tested: Changed fast_food from 20% to 25%, seller saw change immediately, then restored to 20%

commission_at_delivery.implementation: Uses get_food_commission_rates_from_db() -> commission_rates.get(store_type, default) -> calculates platform_commission and seller_earning

code_review_summary.admin_routes: Lines 1327-1363 in admin.py correctly implement GET/PUT for food commissions
code_review_summary.seller_api: Lines 394-428 in food.py correctly reads commission from same DB collection
code_review_summary.delivery_calculation: Lines 1918-1945 in food_orders.py correctly calculates commission using DB rates
code_review_summary.frontend: CommissionsTab.js lines 130-275 implement food commissions UI with edit functionality
